---
title: "智能体拉丁方设计"
author: "林佳欣"
date: "2026-5-29"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
data <- read.table('Agent.txt',header = TRUE)
str(data)
data$Difficulty <- factor(data$Difficulty)
data$SampleSize <- factor(data$SampleSize)
data$拉丁方 <- factor(data$拉丁方)
data$Temperature <- factor(data$Temperature)
data.aov = aov(data$准确率 ~ data$Temperature + data$SampleSize + data$拉丁方, data)
summary(data.aov)
data.aov = aov(data$准确率 ~ data$Temperature + data$SampleSize + data$Difficulty, data)
summary(data.aov)
data.aov.res = residuals(data.aov)
data.aov.fitted = fitted.values(data.aov)
# 残差的正态概率图
source("PP_plot.R")
pp.plot(x = data.aov.res, pch = 0, xlab = "Residual",
line.method = "Q", legend.add = FALSE)
# 残差与拟合值的关系图
plot(data.aov.fitted, data.aov.res,
xlab = "Fitted", ylab = "Residuals", pch = 0)
abline(h = 0)
# 残差与处理的关系图
plot(as.numeric(data$处理), data.aov.res,
xlab = "处理", ylab = "Residuals", pch = 0)
abline(h = 0)
```
